Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype

package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.internal.core.ast
     
    org.eventb.internal.core.ast.expanders
     
    org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension
     
    org.eventb.internal.core.ast.wd
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ArgumentTypeChecker
    Checks that an argument type is well-formed, i.e.
    ConstructorArgument
    Implements unnamed arguments of constructors.
    ConstructorBuilder
    Class used to describe a datatype constructor.
    ConstructorExtension
    This class represents an extension used as constructor for a datatype.
    ConstructorPredicateBuilder
    Utility class for building predicates about constructors.
    Datatype
    Implementation of a complete datatype which references all its extensions (type constructor, value constructors and their destructors).
    DatatypeArgument
    Internal class used to describe a datatype constructor argument in the context of a datatype builder.
    DatatypeBuilder
    The datatype builder provides a way to build a new datatype.
    DatatypeHelper
    This class provides services for building and defining a datatype.
    DatatypeLexer
    This lexer proxy collapses any stream of tokens that represents a recursive call to a datatype to a single token with the name of the datatype.
    DatatypeRewriter
    Rewriter that traverses formulas (see ITypeCheckingRewriter) to translate datatypes into Event-B without datatypes mathematical extensions.
    DatatypeTranslation
    Implementation for translating Event-B formulas containing datatype extensions to plain set theory.
    DatatypeTranslator
    Common implementation of a translator for one datatype instance.
    DestructorExtension
    This class represents an extension used as destructor for a datatype.
    ExtensionHarvester
    Harvests extensions used in some types.
    SetSubstitution
    Represents a set built from a datatype type constructor, where type parameters are associated with some arbitrary sets.
    TypeConstructorExtension
    This class represents an extension used as type constructor for a datatype.
    TypeSubstitution
    Represents an instantiation of a datatype, where type parameters are associated with some arbitrary types.
